app_role_ids.description: A map containing the IDs of the application roles defined in the Azure Active Directory application.

application_id.description: The unique identifier for the Azure Active Directory application, also known as the Client ID.

id.description: The unique Terraform identifier for the Azure Active Directory application resource.

oauth2_permission_scope_ids.description: A map containing the IDs of the OAuth2 permission scopes defined in the Azure Active Directory application.

object_id.description: The unique object identifier for the Azure Active Directory application within the directory.

template_id.description: The ID of the application template used for creating the Azure Active Directory application, if applicable.
